arts.sum: Inter left it late to secure their first win of the Club World Cup as Valentin Carboni's second half injury time strike secured a 2-1 victory over Urawa Red Diamonds. That win was just their second in...

arts.ttl: How to watch Inter Milan vs River Plate: TV channel and live stream for Club World Cup today
arts.sum: Both teams are aiming to avoid a shock group stage exit
